languages.text: Идеально синхронизированные с нервной системой импланты ощущаются так же естественно, как и части тела, дарованные вам при рождении.
Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.
languages.original_text: Идеально синхронизированные с нервной системой импланты ощущаются так же естественно, как и части тела, дарованные вам при рождении.

traits.locale_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.
Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.
Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

languages.text: 神経系と完璧に同期しているため、インプラントは生まれた時の体の一部と同じように自然に感じられます。
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: 神経系と完璧に同期しているため、インプラントは生まれた時の体の一部と同じように自然に感じられます。

languages.text: Sinir sistemine mükemmel uyum sağlayan implantların, doğuştan sahip olduğun vücut parçaları kadar doğal hissettiriyor.
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: Sinir sistemine mükemmel uyum sağlayan implantların, doğuştan sahip olduğun vücut parçaları kadar doğal hissettiriyor.

languages.text: Tus implantes se han sincronizado a la perfección con tu sistema nervioso, hasta el punto en que te parecen tan naturales como las extremidades con las que naciste.
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: Tus implantes se han sincronizado a la perfección con tu sistema nervioso, hasta el punto en que te parecen tan naturales como las extremidades con las que naciste.

languages.text: 你的植入物与神经系统完美同步，感觉就如与生俱来的身体部位一样自然。
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: 你的植入物与神经系统完美同步，感觉就如与生俱来的身体部位一样自然。

languages.text: Parfaitement synchronisés avec votre système nerveux, vos implants vous semblent aussi naturels que les organes avec lesquels vous êtes {mf|né|née}.
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: Parfaitement synchronisés avec votre système nerveux, vos implants vous semblent aussi naturels que les organes avec lesquels vous êtes {mf|né|née}.

languages.text: Deine perfekt mit deinem Nervensystem synchronisierten Implantate fühlen sich ebenso natürlich an wie die Körperteile, mit denen du geboren wurdest.
languages.original_text: Perfectly synchronised with your nervous system, your implants feel as natural as the body parts you were born with.

traits.locale_text: Deine perfekt mit deinem Nervensystem synchronisierten Implantate fühlen sich ebenso natürlich an wie die Körperteile, mit denen du geboren wurdest.
